title: THE LONG EDIT
subtitle: The Suite · 3:18 AM · The Brood Emerges Again
epigraph_upright: The seventeen-year brood is emerging upstate tonight. Davey has been gone fourteen years. Hen has not picked up in three. Marisol is in LA on a soap. The young editor knocked once last month and Elicia did not answer. The show has decayed back into the suite the way a memory decays — Ep. 7 has lost its assembly, Ep. 11 has lost its footage, Ep. 14 has lost its title. Tonight is the version where nothing helps unless Elicia goes herself.
epigraph_reversed: The cicadas are not loud enough. The cue 14 DAT has degraded. Young Elicia's tape has demagnetized in the third drawer. The suite goes quiet for the first time since '99 and it is not the kind of quiet she has been looking for.
scene_description: 3:18 AM. The suite is running on the gear's last working night before Elicia has to take half of it offline for repair. The episode states have decayed: Ep. 3 is still LOCKED but everything else has slipped back. Ep. 7 from PICTURE_LOCK to ASSEMBLY. Ep. 9 from ASSEMBLY to PAPER_ONLY. Ep. 11 from FOOTAGE_ONLY to PAPER_ONLY. Ep. 14 from PAPER_ONLY to TITLE_CARD_ONLY. Ep. 17 — the title card has fallen off the wall. The dish of pomegranate seeds is empty. The kettle has gone cold for the first time in years. Davey's CUE 14 DAT in the library is showing dropout warnings.
direction_hint: Recover what can be recovered. Sit with Davey via the DAT. Sit with young Elicia via the Hi8. Advance one episode against the decay. Survive the night. The brood will come back in another seventeen years; tonight is whether you do.
opening_log_lines: 3:18 AM. The suite hums lower than it ever has.
The cue 14 DAT is dropping bits. You can hear it on the monitor wall.
Outside, the cicadas are doing the thing they only do once every seventeen years.
Hen has not called in 286 days. You have counted.

stagnation_thresholds.label: the suite is the suite, in its bad hour.
the cue 14 DAT loses three more bits.
the modem rack stops humming for the first time since '12.
the suite has gone quiet. it has not been this quiet since '95.

doubt_thresholds.label: elicia at the console, no coffee left.
she is not sure the show was ever going to finish.
she questions whether davey would have wanted any of this.
the editor breaks at her own console.

notes: Reversed-mode Priestess. The Long Edit — 3:18 AM, the suite at its lowest, the show decayed back. Davey and young Elicia present from start (via library DATs); the Entomologist and the Late-Shift Passenger are bound to their episode spaces. Marisol arrives turn 3 — the only present-day cast/crew tonight. Episode-state decay shown in starting_episode_states. Reversed scenario uses tighter timer (7 turns), reduced sanity_max (5), elevated starting stagnation (4) and doubt (3). Win is small but real: 1 episode advanced + sit_with one of the four (Davey, young Elicia, Marisol; Hen is unavailable) + 1 hard mood connection + leap. The ROOF ACCESS threshold tonight ends in the brood emergence — the upstate drive is the right out.
ambient_pool: 3:18 AM. the cicadas. the cicadas. the cicadas.
the answering machine has 287 messages. you have not played them in months.
the kettle is cold. you have not put it on.
the modem rack has stopped humming. it will hum again. probably.
